trade.common.TradeStandardClause.clauseText: General merchandise as per Proforma Invoice No. (REF) dated (DATE). All goods to be packed in export standard seaworthy packaging.
+ Full set of clean on board ocean Bill of Lading made out to the order of (BANK NAME), marked freight (PREPAID/COLLECT) and notify applicant.
+ Signed commercial invoice in 3 originals and 3 copies indicating LC number and contract reference.
This Letter of Credit is subject to Uniform Customs and Practice for Documentary Credits (2007 Revision), International Chamber of Commerce Publication No. 600.
All banking charges outside the issuing bank are for the account of the beneficiary.
